title: Unish/Bish
overview: Rup is the only son of Raghu Babu. Rup is married to his father's friend, Dr.Arindam's niece Pushpa. The couple has a 5-year-old child named Tutu. Rup spent his childhood under strict guidance thus he has no taste of friends, the essence of romance or life.
